summary_en: 300,000 shares acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on 25 May 2026 for ¥148.2M. Execution against board authorization of 410,000 shares (1.14% S/O), ¥410M limit, 18 May–26 June 2026. Remaining 110,000 shares to be acquired via market purchase.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results of Treasury Shares via Off-Exchange Purchase Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: CREAL Inc. executed a treasury share acquisition via off-exchange purchase (ToSTNeT-3) on 25 May 2026, acquiring 300,000 shares for a total of ¥148.2 million. This transaction was conducted pursuant to a board resolution from 15 May 2026 authorizing up to 410,000 shares (representing 1.14% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) at a maximum aggregate cost of ¥410 million, with an execution window from 18 May to 26 June 2026. The shares are being acquired to satisfy stock option exercises. Following completion of this ToSTNeT-3 block purchase, the company intends to continue acquiring the remaining authorized shares (approximately 110,000 shares) via open-market purchase under a discretionary trading agreement, up to the remaining authorized limits.
